calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Directing Transfer To Antoinette B Lewis
Off Calendar Apr-04-2017 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The prior hearing was continued for Counsel to present additional evidence. Absent additional evidence and no one being present, the Petition for Order Establishing Trust's Claim of Ownership of Property and for Authorizing and Directing Transfer to Antoinette B. Lewis is off calendar.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition For Order Establishing Trust'S Claim Of Ownership Of Property And For Authorizing And Directing Transfer To Antoinette B Lewis
Off Calendar Mar-07-2017 Continued To Apr-04-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Denise Leadbetter for petitioner Antoinette Lewis.

The Court expressed concern regarding the effect of a deed transferring the property out of trust which was never rescinded or corrected. Ms. Lewis responded that the removal and failure to return the property into trust was the result of confusion on the part of Ms. Lewis, and that all the beneficiaries understood that the property was included in the trust. The Court stated his willingness to allow additional time for the submission of declarations or additional evidence to establish the intent for the property to be in the trust. Ms. Leadbetter requested that the matter be continued for thirty days to make the additional submissions. The matter was continued to April 4, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204, with any additional submissions or evidence to be filed by March 29, 2017.

Judge: Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
